name: Counterparty 2 name
description: This data element reports the legal name of Counterparty 2.
format: Not more than 105 characters. Legal names longer than 105 characters should be truncated to the first 105 characters.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required for all kinds of reports, if Counterparty 2 is not reported as an LEI, Designated Business Identifier or the value ANON.

citations.document_name: ASIC Derivative Transaction Rules (Reporting) 2024—Schedule 1 technical guidance
